message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in for_basic.zig and test_skip.zig

Add missing orelse_body handlers for for/while loops and match_stmt
handlers in AST traversal functions:

for_basic.zig:
- varIsReassignedInStmt: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, match_stmt

test_skip.zig:
- stmtCallsSelfMethodWithClassArg: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body,
  try_stmt, with_stmt, match_stmt

This ensures complete AST traversal for Python code that uses
while/else, for/else constructs and match statements.
